title.en: Moon Swallowing Heavenly Monarch said in a low ...

content.en:
"Billions?"

Many Heavenly Monarchs in the Void Heaven Hall were a little confused, and even wondered if they had heard it wrong, or if it was Ye Tian's mistake.

"Wanfa Daozi, you just said countless billions?"

Moon Swallowing Heavenly Monarch said in a low voice.

"That's good!" Ye Tian said solemnly: "The value of the Ten Star Sea is unimaginable, the Star Sand is just one of the most ordinary treasures in the Ten Star Sea, and there are Star Crystals in the middle of the Ten Star Sea, and there are a large number of Star Crystals!"

As he spoke, Ye Tian took out a fist-sized star crystal.

This piece of Xingchen Crystal is worth at least more than 1 million, and even in the case of the scarcity of Xingchen Crystal, if it sells 2 million points, someone will buy it!

"This is the Star Crystal I snatched from the Ten Star Sea, and this is only the smallest Star Crystal!" Ye Tian said: "You can imagine how high the value of that large number of Star Crystals is, there are even a person-high Star Crystal, and that piece of Star Crystal alone is at least worth hundreds of millions of Void Heaven Points!"

Listening to Ye Tian's description, the Moon Swallowing Heavenly Monarch's eyes were red, it was red, and he couldn't wait to enter the Ten Star Sea immediately.

At this time, Pengyu Tianjun also understood why the Demon Yin Sect was so strange and mobilized the power of the entire sect to enter the Ten Star Sea, this was because he didn't want the Ten Thousand Law Daozi to leave, and he didn't want the Xingchen Crystal to leak!

At the same time, he was also curious, how did Ye Tian escape?

It stands to reason that after the entire Demon Sound Sect cooperated to besiege and kill, even the Moon Devouring Heavenly Monarch would definitely be killed in an instant.

He knew that Ye Tian's ability to protect his life was strong, but he couldn't compete with so many Heavenly Monarchs, right?

"Ten Thousand Laws Daozi, let's enter the Ten Star Sea!"

Moon Swallowing Heavenly Monarch said excitedly.

At this time, his essence came out of the Ancient Sea Realm.

As for whether something would happen to the Ancient Sea Realm, he didn't care at all.

What is the Ancient Sea Realm? It's worth 1,000 points at most, and it's not completely his.

In addition, the resources of the Ancient Sea Realm cannot be exploited all at once, and it even takes a certain amount of time to cultivate, which is too much worse than the Ten Star Seas.

If you can get some Star Crystals in the Ten Star Sea, you will make a lot of money.

"Don't worry, our Void Heaven Hall can't eat the Star Crystal of the Ten Star Sea, and more importantly, the most precious treasure of the Ten Star Sea is not the Star Crystal!" Ye Tian hurriedly said.

"Isn't the Star Crystal the most precious treasure?"

Swallowing Moon Tianjun and the others were stunned.

"There are stars in the Ten Star Sea!" Ye Tian said.

"Really?"

Moon Swallowing Heavenly Monarch asked with an incredulous look.

"Seriously, I saw it with my own eyes, but that star dzi is not fully conceived, and it will take time. Besides, we can't take the Stellar Dzi. If you think about it carefully, what a treasure it is in the Ten Star Sea, which contains the Star Dzi, if we attack the Ten Star Sea, the news will inevitably leak. At that time, if we wanted to swallow it alone, we would be besieged by countless forces in the entire Great Universe, who would be able to stop it?" Ye Tian asked.

"Unstoppable!"

Moon Swallowing Heavenly Monarch shook his head.

Although he was the third on the Heavenly Monarch List, his strength was not as good as some of the top half-step True Spirits, such as those half-step True Spirit powerhouses who had been promoted to the top dozens of Heavenly Monarch Lists, he couldn't beat those people.

Moreover, how many great forces are contained in the entire universe!

The combined strength of these forces was so terrifying, even if the Void Heaven Temple was ten times stronger, it couldn't stop it.

"If it is announced, at least our Void Heaven Temple can divide some more star crystals. In addition, the Dao Ancestors must be informed, after all, the Star Dzi is too involved, and that thing can be worth a Dao weapon!"

Ye Tian said.

The Heavenly Monarchs all nodded in agreement, the value of the Star Dzi is indeed too much, even ordinary Dao Ancestors will be tempted, for True Ancestors, it is even more supreme, enough to make them desperate!

Subsequently.

Ye Tian used the unique communication treasure of the Void Heaven Temple to contact the Void Heaven One Vein in the chaos and informed the Dao Ancestor of the general situation.

Not long after, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor personally issued a designation.

Contend!

Although Dao Ancestor could not participate, he could withstand the pressure in the chaos at the critical moment, so as not to let the major forces unite to deal with the Void Heaven One Pulse.

If these big forces don't follow the rules and join forces to deal with the Void Heaven Palace, then the Void Heaven Temple won't even be able to get a star crystal.

Next.

The Void Heaven Temple took the initiative to contact the major forces, and the top forces such as the God of War Tower, Qi Heaven Temple, Ten Thousand Gods Sect, Immortal Gate, Mercenary Alliance, Giant Axe City, and Chaos Trading House all learned about the Xingchen Crystal and Xingchen Dzi.

All of a sudden, the top forces sent a large number of Heavenly Monarchs to the Ten Star Sea.

The dense Heavenly Monarch was like a large army pressing the realm, and the terrifying coercion made the Heavenly Monarchs of the Demon Sound Sect of the Ten Star Seas tremble.

With so many Heavenly Monarchs, one round of attacks would be enough to destroy the Demon Sound Sect.

They can't stop it at all!

"Guys, what do you mean by that?"

Baili Zhenjun asked.

He was sweating profusely, and he had already guessed it in his heart, but he was still a little unwilling in his heart, and he was still looking forward to a miracle.

Then.

A giant holding a ten-meter giant axe appeared in front of Baili Zhenjun, he was a half-step true spirit powerhouse in Giant Axe City, Mad Zhenjun!

Mad True Monarch's strength is very strong, he has also entered the ninth place on the Heavenly Monarch List before, and now he is already a half-step True Spirit Realm powerhouse, and the fusion degree of True Spirit and Physical Body has reached fifty percent.

And Baili Zhenjun has only fused three percent, and the strength gap between the two sides is very large.

In addition, the Giant Axe City is not an ordinary top power, but a top force that is more powerful than the Void Heaven One Vein, known as the Six Great Dao Ancestors, among which the most powerful Giant Axe Dao Ancestor can be called an invincible Dao Ancestor, even more powerful than the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, and the power is chaotic for endless years.

"Baili Zhenjun, there are Star Crystals and Star Dzi in the Ten Star Sea, and your Demon Yin Sect can't monopolize them!"

Mad Zhenjun said coldly.

Baili Zhenjun's face turned pale, and the most feared situation happened.

The moment Ye Tian fled, he was worried that Ye Tian would leak the information.

But he also longed for a situation, that is, Ye Tian did not leak the news, maybe Ye Tian would want to monopolize this information so that he could get more Xingchen Crystals in the future.

In this way, he would have enough time to collect the Star Crystal, and even make the Dao Ancestors of the Demon Sound Sect pay a huge price to send in an invincible Heavenly Monarch who had cultivated the Starlight Extermination Hand to the limit level.

In this way, they can collect a large number of stars in a short period of time.

At that time, even if the news is exposed, even if they are oppressed by major forces, they will not care.

However, it was all for naught.

Ye Tian didn't want to hide the information at all, he said it all, and even attracted the top forces.

They can't keep the Star Crystal!

"Mad True Monarch, the Star Crystal and the Star Dzi were discovered by us, and they belong to our Demon Sound Sect, is it too much for you to snatch our treasures?"

"In a word, get out of the way, otherwise the Demon Slayer Sound Sect!"

Mad Zhenjun said coldly.

"Kill!"

Countless Heavenly Monarchs have come to kill them, and they don't want to talk nonsense at all.

As long as Baili Zhenjun doesn't give it to the next word, then they will definitely not say a word and go straight in.

How precious are the Star Crystals, and how precious is the Ten Star Seas with a large number of Star Crystals?

If they get a little benefit, they will earn it, and even the resources of the long years can be gathered.

In this case, if the Demon Yin Sect dares to stop them, they will dare to fight hard!

"That's it!"

Baili Heavenly Monarch smiled bitterly and ordered the other Heavenly Monarchs to withdraw the large array.

At this point, they are completely unable to keep the Star Crystal, and if they resist, I am afraid they will all be killed.

Bang!!!!

The big array was withdrawn, and Xingchen Crystal and Xingchen Dzi couldn't hide it at all.

One Heavenly Monarch's divine sense probed the situation at the bottom of the sea in the central sea of the Ten Star Sea, and the dense star crystals were too dazzling.

And the starry dzi that is being nurtured in the center has attracted everyone's attention.

But soon, they didn't care about the dzi beads.

The Star Dzi was indeed far superior to the other Star Crystals, but they couldn't take it away, unless it was an invincible True Monarch who had cultivated the Star Chaos Divine Power to the extreme level, and it would take a long time to take the Star Crystal, and the others couldn't even shake it.

On the contrary, it is Xingchen Crystal, although it is difficult to take it away, but at least it can be taken away.

With so many big forces, there are always a few Heavenly Monarchs who can take away the Xingchen Crystal, and when the time comes, everyone will work together to take the Xingchen Crystal first, and then slowly distribute it.

In this way, the major forces can reap amazing gains.

"Who is sure to take out the Star Crystal?"

Mad Zhenjun asked.

At this time, the major forces successively stood up some Heavenly Monarchs, including Ye Tian.

"Six Heavenly Monarchs!"

The crowd was amazed.

With so many great forces, only six Heavenly Monarchs were sure to take out the Star Crystal, which showed how difficult it was to take the Star Crystal.

Swish!

The Heavenly Monarchs of the Demon Sound Sect all stared at Ye Tian with murderous eyes, eager to destroy Ye Tian.

If Ye Tian hadn't leaked the secret, their Demon Sound Sect would not have lost the Star Crystal and the Star Dzi.

It can be said that Ye Tian is undoubtedly their enemy, and it is an endless relationship.

If they could kill Ye Tian, they would not hesitate to do it.

Ye Tian noticed the gaze of these Demon Sound Sect Heavenly Monarchs, but he didn't care in the slightest.

"Please take out the Star Crystal!"

Mad Heavenly Monarch Road.

"Distribute the shares of the major forces first, otherwise after taking out the Star Crystal, if it is because of the Star Crystal, it will not be good!" a half-step True Spirit powerhouse of the God of War Tower proposed.

"Yes!"

"Agreed!"

"Agreed!"

......

The major forces agreed.

Then there was a heated discussion on the issue of distributing the share of Xingchen Crystal, and the major forces did not want to give in.

This discussion took place for more than a month.

In the end, because the Void Heaven Temple shared information, and Ye Tian of the Void Heaven Hall was one of the six people who collected the Star Crystal, it got a relatively large share, a full six percent share.

With so many Star Crystals, even if they only have a share of six percent, their value is unimaginable!

And the Demon Sound Sect also got a share, after all, the Star Crystal originally belonged to them, if they didn't give it at all, it would be too offended to the Demon Sound Sect.

The Demon Sound Sect also has Dao Ancestors, and there are several, if they can not be offended, they still don't want to offend.

After the share distribution was over, the six Heavenly Monarchs began to use the star-like chaos supernatural powers, taking out the star crystals little by little!
